set_name: Combat Magic NPC Monster Boss Player Weather Appearance Upgrade Packs

coverage.random_monster_skin_rule: Each pack has a 36-entry weighted skin table and anti-duplicate recent-memory rule.
coverage.combat_camera_rule: Every pack contains a combat-start camera trigger profile with horde, boss, aerial, and support-NPC variants.
